mapper.insert: INSERT OR IGNORE INTO agent_memory_generation_job (job_id, source_run_id, workspace_key, conversation_summary_json, status, not_before) VALUES (#{jobId}, #{sourceRunId}, #{workspaceKey}, #{conversationSummaryJson}, #{status}, #{notBefore})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM agent_memory_generation_job WHERE status = 'PENDING' AND not_before <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ', 'now') ORDER BY not_before ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE agent_memory_generation_job SET status = 'RUNNING', locked_by = #{lockedBy}, lock_expires_at = #{lockExpiresAt}, updated_at = strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ', 'now') WHERE job_id = #{jobId} AND status = 'PENDING'

UPDATE agent_memory_generation_job SET status = #{status}, locked_by = NULL, lock_expires_at = NULL, error_message = NULL, updated_at = strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ', 'now') WHERE job_id = #{jobId} AND status = 'RUNNING' AND locked_by = #{lockedBy}

UPDATE agent_memory_generation_job SET status = 'PENDING', retry_count = #{retryCount}, not_before = #{notBefore}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, locked_by = NULL, lock_expires_at = NULL, updated_at = strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ', 'now') WHERE job_id = #{jobId}

UPDATE agent_memory_generation_job SET status = 'FAILED', retry_count = #{retryCount}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, locked_by = NULL, lock_expires_at = NULL, updated_at = strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ', 'now') WHERE job_id = #{jobId}

UPDATE agent_memory_generation_job SET status = CASE WHEN retry_count >= #{maxRetries} THEN 'FAILED' ELSE 'PENDING' END, retry_count = retry_count + 1, locked_by = NULL, lock_expires_at = NULL, error_message = CASE WHEN retry_count >= #{maxRetries} THEN 'Exceeded max retries after stale recovery' ELSE 'Stale job recovered' END, not_before = CASE WHEN retry_count >= #{maxRetries} THEN not_before ELSE strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ', 'now') END, updated_at = strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ', 'now') WHERE status = 'RUNNING' AND lock_expires_at <= #{staleThreshold}
